metadata.description: Domain expertise and guardrails for authoring Claude Code skill plugins

plugins.name: skill-factory-toolkit
plugins.description: Authoring skills, pattern references, and governance guides for the skill factory

plugins.name: ui-finisher
plugins.description: Audit a single page — by URL/route or file path — for unfinished interactive elements (orphaned buttons, stubbed handlers, missing side effects) and propose patches with human approval. Static analysis only.
